text: A PICTURE OF PEOPLE AT A CELEBRATION OR EVENT
A white bathroom with brick walls and a large window.
A well made bed in a small room.
some dogs standing by a boy waiting for a frisbee
The man is playing with scissors by his face.
The young child is eating a piece of fruit at the table.
Multiple stop and yield signs on the corner of St Louis.
a dollhouse with furniture and a doll sitting on the floor
A plate of smothered French fries on a table with soda cans.
A man riding a surfboard on a fast moving river.
